tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.potion.warning: Drinking a potion means accepting the risk of losing control
message.lord_of_mysteries.potion.already: You already belong to a pathway and cannot drink this potion
message.lord_of_mysteries.potion.advance: The veil of the spirit world parts. You advanced to Sequence 9 Seer (quality: %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.potion.hunter_: Blood and tracks become clear. You advanced to Sequence %s %s (quality: %s)
message.lord_of_mysteries.potion.digesti: The current potion is not fully digested; Sequence 8 remains unsafe
message.lord_of_mysteries.potion.incompa: Your current pathway and sequence cannot consume this potion
message.lord_of_mysteries.ability.no_tar: Look at a living target within 16 blocks
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.unav: You have not mastered the required Spectator pathway ability
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.no_e: No emotional target is in your line of sight
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.pred: Behavior Prediction: you anticipated the attack and reduced its damage by 40%
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.pvp_: The server has disabled mental abilities against players
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.targ: %s has too much mental resistance for the suggestion
message.lord_of_mysteries.spectator.sugg: %s placed a visible, resistible suggestion on you for %s seconds; sneak to shorten later suggestions
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.unavail: You have not mastered the required Hunter pathway ability
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.trackin: You memorized %s's blood and movement; tracking lasts 45 seconds
Tracking %s: about %s blocks away, %s seconds remain
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.no_prov: No low-resistance enemies within 10 blocks can be provoked
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.provoke: Provoke affected %s targets; they prioritize you for %s seconds
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.enrage_: You enraged %s for %s seconds: attack rises and defense falls
%s enraged you for %s seconds: attack rises and defense falls
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.pvp_blo: Current server rules do not allow you to harm that player
message.lord_of_mysteries.hunter.battle_: Battle Will: incoming damage is reduced by 15% for %s seconds
message.lord_of_mysteries.crucible.ingre: Ingredient %s was added to the crucible
message.lord_of_mysteries.crucible.start: Brewing started. Maintain a suitable heat source and temperature
message.lord_of_mysteries.crucible.help: Recipe cores: Divination Crystal, Fermented Spider Eye, Book, Bone, or Gunpowder. A third ingredient improves quality
message.lord_of_mysteries.acting.penalty: Your actions strayed from the acting principles, agitating the potion
message.lord_of_mysteries.acting.complet: The potion has fully settled; you now have the foundation to advance
message.lord_of_mysteries.acting.strong: You gained a clear new understanding of the acting principles
message.lord_of_mysteries.acting.faint: The potion within you seems a little calmer
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.mild: You hear a whisper that cannot be there
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.moder: Something watches from the edge of your vision
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.sever: The boundary of reason is collapsing
message.lord_of_mysteries.insanity.break: You lost control. Your body is immobilized as a distorted form emerges beside you
The breakdown tore apart your extraordinary characteristic and returned you to a commoner
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.artifact.match: Ignites spirit flame and harms spirits; each use adds 15 insanity pressure
message.lord_of_mysteries.artifact.match: The Eternal Matchbox's anger enters your mind (insanity pressure +15)
screen.lord_of_mysteries.status.title: Extraordinary Record
screen.lord_of_mysteries.status.commoner: You remain a commoner. Seek knowledge and brew your first potion.
screen.lord_of_mysteries.status.hidden: Only vague changes can be felt
screen.lord_of_mysteries.status.no_knowl: No occult knowledge has been recorded
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.materia: A material was placed on the ritual altar
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.started: The calming seal begins and the surrounding spirituality settles
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.progres: The ritual continues; about %s seconds remain
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.sealed: The seal is complete; the Eternal Matchbox falls silent
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.require: Requires a clear night, eight chalk marks at radius 3, Eternal Matchbox, 3 Pure Water, 5 Blue Orchids, and 8 White Candles
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.structu: The ritual pattern broke; materials were preserved and the ritual was cancelled
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.cancell: Ritual conditions failed; materials were preserved
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.perfect: Perfect ritual: the seal is exceptionally stable
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.success: Ritual succeeded: the seal is stable
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.failure: Ritual failed: polluted smoke enters your mind (insanity pressure +10)
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.severe_: Severe ritual failure: a spirit breached the pattern and pollution increased by 15
message.lord_of_mysteries.ritual.catastr: Ritual catastrophe: an explosion and breakdown entity arrived together; pollution increased by 25
message.lord_of_mysteries.artifact.seale: This artifact cannot be used while sealed
tooltip.lord_of_mysteries.artifact.seale: Sealed: both effect and cost are suppressed
